requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——家用制冷器具（埃塞俄比亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——家用製冷器具（衣索比亞）

summary.en: Ethiopia does not operate an EU-style mandatory horizontal EMC regime (there is no Ethiopian equivalent of the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requiring EMC self-declaration and CE-style marking as a precondition for placing all household appliances on the market). The Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) may adopt the relevant international EMC standards (the IEC/CISPR 14 series — emission CISPR 14-1 and immunity CISPR 14-2 — for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) as voluntary Ethiopian Standards (ES), but for ordinary household refrigerators EMC is generally not the binding gate for market access. Radio/telecom equipment (and appliances with wireless connectivity such as Wi-Fi/Bluetooth smart features) is separately regulated by the Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) for type-approval of the radio module. Where an Ethiopian EMC standard applies, it would be based on the same IEC/CISPR 14 family that China's GB 4343.1 is aligned to, so the technical content would be closely related. The in-country importer should confirm whether any EMC documentation is requested as part of CACEA import inspection.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚不设欧盟式强制横向EMC制度（不存在与欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU等同、要求EMC自我声明并以CE式标志作为所有家用器具上市前提的规定）。埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）可将相关国际EMC标准（适用于家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的IEC/CISPR 14系列——发射CISPR 14-1、抗扰度CISPR 14-2）采纳为自愿性埃塞俄比亚标准（ES），但对于普通家用电冰箱，EMC通常不是市场准入的约束性门槛。无线电/电信设备（及带无线连接功能如Wi-Fi/蓝牙智能特性的器具）由埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）单独监管，对无线电模块进行型号核准。在适用埃塞EMC标准的情况下，其将基于与中国GB 4343.1对齐的同一IEC/CISPR 14系列，故技术内容密切相关。在地进口商应确认CACEA进口检验是否要求任何EMC文件。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞不設歐盟式強制橫向EMC制度（不存在與歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU等同、要求EMC自我聲明並以CE式標誌作為所有家用器具上市前提的規定）。衣索比亞標準局（ESA）可將相關國際EMC標準（適用於家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的IEC/CISPR 14系列——發射CISPR 14-1、抗擾度CISPR 14-2）採納為自願性衣索比亞標準（ES），但對於普通家用電冰箱，EMC通常不是市場准入的約束性門檻。無線電/電信設備（及帶無線連接功能如Wi-Fi/藍牙智慧特性的器具）由衣索比亞通信管理局（ECA）單獨監管，對無線電模組進行型號核准。在適用衣索EMC標準的情況下，其將基於與中國GB 4343.1對齊的同一IEC/CISPR 14系列，故技術內容密切相關。在地進口商應確認CACEA進口檢驗是否要求任何EMC文件。

standards_or_laws: No mandatory EU-style horizontal EMC directive in Ethiopia for household appliances (no equivalent of EU Directive 2014/30/EU)
IEC/CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) — international EMC family for household appliances that ESA may adopt as voluntary ES
Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) — separate type-approval of radio modules for any wireless-connected appliance
CACEA / Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration — import inspection (confirm with importer whether EMC documentation is requested)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonic emissions; mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) where applicable. These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because China's GB 4343.1 derives from the CISPR 14 family, any Ethiopian EMC standard adopted from the same IEC/CISPR base would be technically close — but EMC is not a binding precondition for Ethiopian market access for ordinary household refrigerators in the way CCC EMC testing is mandatory in China.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行，必要时适用GB 17625.1-2022（谐波发射；强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国GB 4343.1源自CISPR 14系列，任何从同一IEC/CISPR基础采纳的埃塞EMC标准在技术上都将密切相关——但对于普通家用电冰箱，EMC并非埃塞市场准入的约束性前提，不像CCC的EMC检测在中国为强制要求。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行，必要時適用GB 17625.1-2022（諧波發射；強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國GB 4343.1源自CISPR 14系列，任何從同一IEC/CISPR基礎採納的衣索EMC標準在技術上都將密切相關——但對於普通家用電冰箱，EMC並非衣索市場准入的約束性前提，不像CCC的EMC檢測在中國為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The EMC gap is the inverse of the EU case: rather than facing a stricter foreign EMC mandate, Chinese exporters generally face NO binding EU-style EMC market-access gate in Ethiopia for ordinary refrigerators. Practical points: (1) China's existing GB 4343.1 (CISPR 14-1 based) EMC test data is technically relevant and, if an Ethiopian EMC standard or importer request applies, a CISPR 14-1/14-2 (or IEC equivalent) test report is the portable evidence — an IECEE CB-linked or ILAC MRA EMC report avoids re-testing. (2) Wireless features — if the refrigerator has Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, the radio module needs separate ECA type-approval; this is the one EMC/radio-related Ethiopian gate that does bite, and it is distinct from appliance EMC. (3) No horizontal regime — where Ethiopia lacks an EU-style mandatory EMC directive, there is no Ethiopian counterpart obligation to GB 4343.1 CCC EMC certification; exporters should still confirm with the importer whether CACEA inspection requests any EMC documentation.
gap.zh: EMC差距与欧盟情形相反：中国出口商一般不面临更严格的外国EMC强制要求，而是对普通电冰箱在埃塞俄比亚没有欧盟式EMC市场准入门槛。实务要点：（1）中国现有GB 4343.1（基于CISPR 14-1）的EMC检测数据在技术上相关，若适用埃塞EMC标准或进口商要求，CISPR 14-1/14-2（或IEC等效）检测报告即为可移植证据——IECEE CB关联或ILAC MRA的EMC报告可避免重新检测。（2）无线功能——若电冰箱带Wi-Fi/蓝牙，无线电模块须单独取得ECA型号核准；这是确实存在的与EMC/无线电相关的埃塞门槛，且与器具EMC不同。（3）无横向制度——在埃塞缺乏欧盟式强制EMC指令的情况下，不存在对应GB 4343.1 CCC的EMC认证义务；出口商仍应向进口商确认CACEA检验是否要求任何EMC文件。
gap.zht: EMC差距與歐盟情形相反：中國出口商一般不面臨更嚴格的外國EMC強制要求，而是對普通電冰箱在衣索比亞沒有歐盟式EMC市場准入門檻。實務要點：（1）中國現有GB 4343.1（基於CISPR 14-1）的EMC檢測數據在技術上相關，若適用衣索EMC標準或進口商要求，CISPR 14-1/14-2（或IEC等效）檢測報告即為可移植證據——IECEE CB關聯或ILAC MRA的EMC報告可避免重新檢測。（2）無線功能——若電冰箱帶Wi-Fi/藍牙，無線電模組須單獨取得ECA型號核准；這是確實存在的與EMC/無線電相關的衣索門檻，且與器具EMC不同。（3）無橫向制度——在衣索缺乏歐盟式強制EMC指令的情況下，不存在對應GB 4343.1 CCC的EMC認證義務；出口商仍應向進口商確認CACEA檢驗是否要求任何EMC文件。

mandatory_status.target: Generally not a binding horizontal gate — Ethiopia has no EU-style mandatory EMC directive for household appliances; CISPR 14-based ES standards, if adopted, are typically voluntary. Wireless-connected appliances require separate ECA radio type-approval. Confirm with importer/CACEA whether EMC documentation is requested
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: IEC/CISPR (CISPR 14 family) — basis for any voluntary Ethiopian EMC standard adopted by ESA; ECA regulates radio type-approval separately

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia does not impose an EU-style mandatory EMC directive on ordinary household refrigerators, so there is generally no binding Ethiopian counterpart to China's GB 4343.1 CCC EMC certification. Any Ethiopian EMC standard would be adopted from the CISPR 14 family China already aligns to, making existing test data technically relevant. The one real radio gate is ECA type-approval for any Wi-Fi/Bluetooth module. Confirm with the importer whether CACEA import inspection requests EMC documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚对普通家用电冰箱不实施欧盟式强制EMC指令，故通常不存在对应中国GB 4343.1 CCC EMC认证的约束性埃塞义务。任何埃塞EMC标准都将从中国已对齐的CISPR 14系列采纳，使现有检测数据在技术上相关。唯一确实存在的无线电门槛是任何Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块的ECA型号核准。请向进口商确认CACEA进口检验是否要求EMC文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞對普通家用電冰箱不實施歐盟式強制EMC指令，故通常不存在對應中國GB 4343.1 CCC EMC認證的約束性衣索義務。任何衣索EMC標準都將從中國已對齊的CISPR 14系列採納，使現有檢測數據在技術上相關。唯一確實存在的無線電門檻是任何Wi-Fi/藍牙模組的ECA型號核准。請向進口商確認CACEA進口檢驗是否要求EMC文件。
